# Indic Normalize MCP

> Indic transliteration, Indian name canonicalization, address parsing, PIN/PAN/GSTIN validation

This MCP server exposes 7 tools via the Model Context Protocol (JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP POST). It runs on Cloudflare Workers and is billed via Dodo Payments. Authenticated via `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` obtained by subscribing at `https://indic-normalize-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade`.

## Endpoint
- MCP JSON-RPC: https://indic-normalize-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp
- Health: https://indic-normalize-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/health
- Landing page: https://indic-normalize-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/
- Get API key: https://indic-normalize-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade?tier=solo

## Tools
- `transliterate`: Transliterate between Indic scripts and Latin (Devanagari, Bengali, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Gurmukhi, Gujarati, Oriya).
- `detect_script`: Detect dominant script + per-script counts + confidence score.
- `normalize_name`: Normalize Indian personal name — strip honorifics, title-case, return canonical + spelling variants.
- `normalize_address`: Parse Indian postal address: line, locality, city, state (from PIN), pincode.
- `pincode_to_locality`: Decode a 6-digit Indian PIN code to region + likely state(s).
- `state_from_pan`: Validate PAN and extract entity type (individual/company/HUF/firm/trust).
- `gstin_info`: Validate GSTIN and return state code + state name.

## Authentication
Pass `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` on POST /mcp. Free tier: anonymous, 100 calls / month / IP.

## Pricing
- Free: 100 calls / month (anonymous, no signup)
- Solo $9/mo: 2,000 calls / month, 60/min
- Team $29/mo: 10,000 calls / month, 200/min, 5 team seats
- Pro $79/mo: 50,000 calls / month, 600/min, 25 team seats
Billed via Dodo Payments (merchant-of-record). Cancel anytime.

## Account management
- View account: GET https://indic-normalize-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account (Bearer)
- Rotate key: POST https://indic-normalize-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/rotate (Bearer)
- GDPR data export: GET https://indic-normalize-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/export (Bearer)
- Team management (Team+): https://indic-normalize-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/team
